title: ecbolium candicans
intro: Ecbolium candicans, also known as the False Dragonhead, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ecbolium candicans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Ecbolium candicans is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil, allowing its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
